news-thai-econ.title: Report: China Ignores Belt and Road Victims' Calls for Help with Rising Energy Costs
news-thai-econ.description: Clients of China’s vast Belt and Road Initiative (BRI) are asking Beijing for help with spiking energy costs due to the Iran conflict, but so far China has reportedly offered little assistance, instead shutting down fuel exports to conserve its own energy sto…

news-global-econ.title: Colorado tried to silence me for helping gender-confused kids. The Supreme Court just ruled 8-1 in my favor
news-global-econ.description: I won an 8-1 U.S. Supreme Court ruling in Chiles v. Salazar, striking down a Colorado law that silenced licensed counselors on gender identity issues.

news-global-econ.title: More key US allies block military flights as Iran war rift widens with Trump
news-global-econ.description: President Donald Trump blasted France, Spain, Italy, and the U.K. on Truth Social, criticizing their refusal to support U.S. military operations tied to the war with Iran.

news-global-econ.title: 10 things to stop paying for to save money now
news-global-econ.description: Small, recurring costs add up fast. Here are 10 everyday expenses you can reduce right now to free up more room in your monthly budget.

news-global-soc.title: Sharon Stone blasts ‘blatant, harsh sexuality’ in modern TV, says she fast-forwards through sex scenes
news-global-soc.description: "Basic Instinct" star Sharon Stone says she fast-forwards past modern sex scenes, arguing modern on-screen sexuality has lost the mystery and yearning that made it powerful.

news-global-soc.title: Trump admin to hold global summit on countering Antifa, sources confirm
news-global-soc.description: The Trump administration is considering a global summit to counter Antifa and left-wing extremist networks, saying they pose a transnational terror threat.

news-global-soc.title: Gunmen on bikes storm Nigeria village on Palm Sunday, killing at least 20
news-global-soc.description: Gunmen on motorcycles shot sporadically into a Nigerian community on Palm Sunday, killing at least 20, residents say, prompting a 48-hour curfew in Plateau state.
